title: Battle of Bright Tree Village (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle of Bright Tree Village''' was the name of a number of conflicts which took place in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]]:

Battles:
*[[Battle of Bright Tree Village (Zorbian Space Pirate crisis)]]: The [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] are attacked by the [[Zorbian space pirates]], led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Krag (Zorbian)|Krag]].
*[[Battle of Bright Tree Village (Kradak crisis)]]: The village comes together to fight off a monstrous [[Kradak/Legends|Kradak]].
*[[Battle of Bright Tree Village (Stranglethorn crisis)]]: The village is attacked by a rampaging [[stranglethorn]].
*[[Battle of Bright Tree Village (Stranger War)]]: The village is attacked by the [[Dulok/Legends|Duloks]], under the leadership of the [[Stranger]].
*[[Battle of Bright Tree Village (Imperial-Ewok War)]]: The village is attacked by [[Raygar]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]].

{{Disambig}}

[[Category:Battles of Endor|*]]
